description: Analyze Kuaishou workflows with JustOneAPI, including user Search, user Published Videos, and video Details across 7 operations.

operations.description: Get Kuaishou user Profile data, including account metadata, audience metrics, and verification-related fields, for creator research and building creator profiles and monitoring audience growth and account status.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The unique user ID on Kuaishou.
parameters.name: userId

operations.description: Get Kuaishou user Published Videos data, including covers, publish times, and engagement metrics, for creator monitoring and content performance analysis.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The unique user ID on Kuaishou.
parameters.name: userId

operations.description:
Retrieves public comments of a Kuaishou video, including comment content,
author info, like count, and reply count.

Typical use cases:
- Sentiment analysis and community feedback monitoring
- Gathering engagement data for specific videos

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The unique ID of the Kuaishou video, e.g. `3xbknvct79h46h9` or refer_photo_id `177012131237`
parameters.name: videoId

operations.description: Get Kuaishou video Details data, including video URL, caption, and author info, for in-depth content performance analysis and building databases of viral videos.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The unique ID of the Kuaishou video, e.g. `3xg9avuebhtfcku`
parameters.name: videoId

operations.description: Get Kuaishou user Search data, including profile names, avatars, and follower counts, for creator discovery and account research.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The search keyword to find users.
parameters.name: keyword

parameters.description: Page number for results, starting from 1.
parameters.name: page

operations.description: Get Kuaishou video Search data, including video ID, cover image, and description, for competitive analysis and market trends and keywords monitoring and brand tracking.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The search keyword to find videos.
parameters.name: keyword

parameters.description: Page number for results, starting from 1.
parameters.name: page

operations.description: Get Kuaishou share Link Resolution data, including resolved content identifier and target object data, for resolving shared links for automated content processing.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token
